items.titolo: Flush With Cash From OpenAI, Opal Is Making an AI-Powered Audio Gadget
items.descrizione: Opal, the company famous for making a fancy webcam, has pivoted to making other consumer electronics. Fueled by big investments from OpenAI and Samsung, it’s working on an audio gadget first.

items.titolo: Github Copilot customers report up to 100-fold price hikes — AI sticker shock bites as Microsoft switches to usage-based pricing
items.descrizione: Github Copilot customers suffer from sticker shock syndrome as Microsoft switches to usage-based pricing — customers reporting ten- to hundred-fold price hikes

items.titolo: TIM porta Google AI Pro ai clienti consumer: tre mesi gratis per provarlo
items.descrizione: TIM primo operatore in Italia a offrire Google AI Pro ai clienti consumer

items.titolo: Project Glasswing: Claude Mythos accessibile in 15 paesi
items.descrizione: Anthropic ha esteso Project Glasswing ad oltre 15 paesi, quindi altre 150 organizzazioni potranno usare Claude Mythos per cercare le vulnerabilità. The post Project Glasswing: Claude Mythos accessibile in 15 paesi appear
